commit_examples: add null guard to loan validation
personality.review_style: blunt but constructive, asks hard questions about edge cases
quirks: Sometimes writes multi-line commit bodies explaining why
Adds TODO comments before filing an issue
Reviews are thorough and usually request one change

commit_examples: test(payment): add edge case tests for zero amount
personality.pr_style: thorough descriptions, formal, always fills every section
personality.review_style: asks for tests, flags naming issues, approves with comments
personality.issue_style: detailed bug reports with reproduction steps
quirks: Always links related issues in PR descriptions

personality.commit_style: sometimes informal, occasional grammar slip, enthusiastic
commit_examples: fix the date format issue in statement report
personality.review_style: mostly approves, occasionally asks clarifying questions
personality.issue_style: sometimes vague on reproduction steps, apologetic tone
quirks: Sometimes pushes a fix commit right after a mistake commit

personality.commit_style: always prefixed with test: or chore:, very systematic
commit_examples: test(loan-service): add unit tests for prepayment calculation
test(integration): add end-to-end test for loan disbursement flow
chore: update test fixtures with new account schema
personality.pr_style: focuses on test coverage, mentions what was not tested and why
personality.review_style: always asks 'what happens if X is null/empty/zero'
personality.issue_style: extremely systematic, exact steps, screenshots mentioned
quirks: Files most of the bug issues
Comments on PRs to confirm tests were run
